content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and `HMHomeManager()` instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift (App/WallpaperGridView.swift:2,5) with no home-automation UI; the app is a wallpaper browser and shows no accessory/home-related features.
Pierre: Apple requires HomeKit usage to be tied to genuine home-automation functionality, and unused frameworks with sensitive entitlements often trigger manual review questions or rejection under 2.5.1/4.5.3. Here the HomeKit import and manager instantiation appear unrelated to the app's actual purpose (wallpapers), which looks like leftover/misused code. Remove the HomeKit import, manager, and entitlement if unused, or implement genuine home UI if it's intentional.
